NIT Jalandhar – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, NIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameDr. B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology, Jalandhar
Also Known AsNITJ
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1987
LocationJalandhar, Punjab

NIT Jalandhar: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as NIT Jalandhar and NITJ.

ADDRESS

Dr. B. R. Ambedkar National Institute of Technology, GT Road, Amritsar Bypass Road, Jalandhar, Punjab – 144011

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Adampur Airport, Jalandhar
32.5 km
Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar
81.5 km
Jalandhar City Junction Railway Station
14 km
Jalandhar Cantonment Railway Station
19 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious

QS Asia University Rankings666 (2026)661-680 (2025)

National Ranking
NIRF Overall Rankings101-150 (2025)101-150 (2024)
NIRF Engineering Rankings55 (2025)58 (2024)
NIRF Innovation Rankings11-50 (2023)--
Outlook India's Top Govt. Engineering Colleges15 (2025)15 (2024)
India Today Top Engineering Colleges29 (2023)--
The Week Best Technical Universities India25 (2023)--
The Week Top Engineering Colleges India30 (2025)30 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Biotechnology
  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Data Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Electronics and VLSI Engineering
  • Industrial and Production Engineering
  • Information Technology
  • Instrumentation and Control Engineering
  • Mathematics and Computing
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Textile Technology

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹5,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹17,000
Total₹84,500

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Mess Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹10,000
One-Time Fees₹500
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹6,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹2,500
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹25,000
Total₹44,000

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older
